use_cases: Display subscription tiers with pricing and feature lists
Highlight featured or popular pricing plan with visual emphasis
Provide call-to-action buttons for plan selection
Show pricing comparisons across multiple service tiers
Convert visitors to paid customers through clear pricing presentation
ai_summary: A pricing section component featuring animated pricing cards with tier comparisons, featuring premium iconography (Diamond, Sparkles), motion animations via Framer Motion, and multi-variant buttons for user interactions. Designed for SaaS and e-commerce platforms to showcase subscription plans with hover effects and scroll-triggered animations.
